Afghanistan (modern borders) — world's #1 illicit opium producer
description: Modern political border. ~85% of world illicit opium 2020. Helmand + Kandahar provinces anchor. Taliban banned poppy in 2022 but fentanyl-precursor chemistry and regional stockpiles continue supply.

Myanmar Shan State (modern borders) — Golden Triangle
description: Modern political border. Myanmar + Laos + Thailand tri-border zone = Golden Triangle. 2nd-largest illicit opium producer. Ethnic armed groups control territory; UN counter-narcotics programs have limited reach.

Mexico (modern borders) — main supplier to US illicit market
description: Modern political border. Sinaloa + Guerrero + Durango produce heroin + increasingly synthesize fentanyl. Cartel supply crosses US border; ~70,000 US fentanyl overdose deaths 2023 (CDC).

USA / Appalachia (modern borders) — opioid-crisis epicentre
description: Modern political borders. West Virginia + Kentucky + Ohio + Tennessee + Virginia coal-country counties have the highest US overdose rates. Purdue Pharma's OxyContin marketing deliberately targeted these communities (DOJ + congressional investigations).

India (modern borders) — licit pharmaceutical opium
description: Modern political border. India is the world's largest LICIT poppy producer — government-controlled farms supply global pharma morphine + codeine markets under UN 1961 Single Convention.

Turkey (modern borders) — licit pharmaceutical opium
description: Modern political border. Turkey is the other major licit poppy producer — UN-approved pharma supply. Since 1971 US pressure led to a closed 'poppy-straw' system replacing traditional lancing.
